sections.title: Black ownership is Black survival, freedom and wealth.
sections.subhead: We help Black founders build businesses that last.
body: Cupcakes + Broccoli is a place to get steady support, real guidance and clear direction as you build. If you are working on something that matters, you are in the right room.

sections.title: For founders who want stronger support.
body: The Decision Room is a membership for people building real businesses.
list: Essays like "Are You Underpricing, Overpricing or Just Uncomfortable?"
Decision case studies that break down real founder moments step by step
Tools like a Pricing Reality Check worksheet, a Launch Readiness checklist, and a Partnership Red-Flag guide
An AI prompt stack on how to pressure-test AI thinking before you act, including copy-and-use prompts and a guide to spotting weak outputs
Access to live sessions where real business problems get worked through together
bodyAfter: No hustle culture. No shallow motivation. No pretending business is easy.
Just honest insight and practical direction you can use right away.

sections.title: When you need to solve something now.
body: Business Counsel is a focused session designed to help you work through a specific problem.
list: Should a beauty founder expand into wholesale or double down on direct-to-consumer?
How should a psychiatrist or dermatologist structure a possible influencer or celebrity collaboration?
Is it time for a freelance web developer to raise rates or walk away from a draining client?
Would launching a podcast actually help a CPA build authority, and how should it be positioned?
Should a Brooklyn wine shop and restaurant make a major menu shift or pursue a new partnership?
bodyAfter: Or it might be something else entirely.
We get to the heart of it quickly. You leave with a clear next move and a plan you can stand behind.

image.alt: Amanda Johnson smiling in a studio portrait.

sections.title: For big moves.
body: If you are preparing to launch, grow, reposition, or fix something that is not working, we can work together in a focused engagement.
list: Leading the rebrand of a core beauty product that has outgrown its original look and messaging
Project managing a website rebuild so it reflects the business and supports sales
Designing a social media strategy for a small but serious team
Reviewing a brand's product mix to decide what to cut, keep, and prioritize
Building a go-to-market plan for a service-based founder introducing new offerings
bodyAfter: This is not an open-ended retainer.
It is structured work with a clear goal and timeline.
If you are ready to make a serious move, apply to work together.

image.alt: Amanda Johnson in a studio portrait with hand at chin.

sections.title: Real life decisions. Not the highlight reel.
body: In our case studies, we break down:
list: What the founder was facing
What options were on the table
What they chose
What changed after

image.alt: Portrait of a founder in studio light.

sections.title: Blind Dinners
body: Small, invitation-only dinners Amanda hosts and cooks herself.
Guests do not know who else is coming until they arrive.
The room brings together founders, creatives, executives, and builders from different backgrounds to talk honestly about business, ownership, and navigating rooms that were not built for us.
list: No panels.
No name tags.
Just real conversation around the table.

image.alt: Guests gathered around a dinner table.
